title: Pin Bar, Engulfing Patterns and RSI Divergence (Multi-Pattern) Tool
subtitle: Dual Confirmation — Candlestick Pattern AND RSI Divergence Required Simultaneously
author: Christian Benjamin (lynnchris)
verdict: HIGH EXTRACT — dual-confirmation architecture (candlestick pattern AND RSI divergence both required), pin bar detection with 10% body minimum, engulfing definition, RSI divergence scan window 5-15 bars.

core_concept.name: Candlestick + RSI Divergence Dual Confirmation
core_concept.description: Signal requires BOTH a candlestick pattern (pin bar OR engulfing) AND RSI divergence at the same bar. Neither alone is sufficient. Returns +1 (bullish) or -1 (bearish) only when both conditions fire simultaneously.
core_concept.dual_requirement: candlestick_signal != 0 AND rsi_divergence_signal != 0 AND signs match
core_concept.relevance_to_creviaderiv: Our departure candle (single candlestick check) could be upgraded to require divergence confirmation. When price touches a zone AND shows a pin bar AND RSI is diverging = very high confidence signal. Maps to our gate chain architecture.

pin_bar_formula.bullish: bot_shadow >= 2.0 * body AND top_shadow < 0.5 * body AND body > 0.1 * full_range
pin_bar_formula.bearish: top_shadow >= 2.0 * body AND bot_shadow < 0.5 * body AND body > 0.1 * full_range
pin_bar_formula.note: Body must be > 10% of range — prevents detecting pin bars on micro-candles

engulfing_formula.bullish: prev bearish AND curr_open <= prev_close AND curr_close >= prev_open AND curr_body > prev_body
engulfing_formula.bearish: prev bullish AND curr_open >= prev_close AND curr_close <= prev_open AND curr_body > prev_body

rsi_divergence_scan.bullish_divergence: price making lower lows BUT RSI above oversold (30) and rising — momentum weakening before reversal
rsi_divergence_scan.bearish_divergence: price making higher highs BUT RSI below overbought (70) and falling
rsi_divergence_scan.note: Different from Part 13 (RSI Sentinel) — this uses fixed 5-15 bar scan, not swing-based. Simpler but less precise.

SL_Pips.description: Fixed SL in pips — too simplistic

keep: Dual-confirmation architecture: BOTH candle pattern AND RSI divergence required
RSI scan window 5-15 bars for divergence check
Return +1/-1/0 from each sub-function for clean combination logic
discard: Fixed SL/TP in pips (20 pips hardcoded) — use our structural SL
Simple 5-15 bar RSI scan — use swing-based divergence from Part 13 instead
improve: Replace fixed RSI scan with Part 13 swing-based divergence detection
Use our structural SL/TP instead of fixed pips
Add dual confirmation as optional high-confidence mode: zone_touch + candle_pattern + rsi_divergence = max signal strength

triple_confirmation_signal.gate_2: departure candle pattern (Pin Bar or Engulfing — upgrade from simple directional)
triple_confirmation_signal.gate_3: RSI divergence at zone touch (swing-based from Part 13)
triple_confirmation_signal.result: All 3 = HIGH confidence signal. Gates 1+2 only = MEDIUM. Skip if only gate 1.
